name: The Swing Refinery
address: 2400 W Ryan Rd #3, Oak Creek, WI 53154
about: The Swing Refinery is a self-service indoor golf studio offering practice bays, leagues, and tournaments powered by premium simulators. It provides 24/7 access for members and operates on a reservation-only basis for non-members between 10am-9pm daily. The venue emphasizes technology, community, and flexible playing options with a focus on self-service and convenience.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulators with accurate ball data
Leagues and tournaments for all skill levels
Flexible pricing with options for single reservations or memberships

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, BYOB policy not specified
No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulators used for ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to have a membership?
faq.answer: No, you can make a single reservation without a membership.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: No specific policy is mentioned regarding food or drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For full-round play, a good rule of thumb is to allow about one hour per player to complete an 18-hole round on a simulator.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information is provided regarding child-friendly policies or amenities.
